articles.title: Largest energy storage facility statewide gets approved for construction in Everett
articles.description:
The proposed facility’s construction is the first part of a wider development project at the former ExxonMobil tank farm site.

The post Largest energy storage facility statewide gets approved for construction in Everett appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Everett's new energy storage facility approved, marking a significant development at the former ExxonMobil site.
Facility will be the largest in Massachusetts, enhancing energy reliability for Boston residents.
Construction supports local job creation and sustainable energy initiatives in the Greater Boston area.

articles.title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Connor Storrie hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
articles.description:

summary: Connor Storrie, a local star, hosted SNL on February 28, 2026.

Storrie's appearance boosts Boston's representation in national entertainment.

articles.title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s loss against the Red Bulls
articles.description:
"I don’t like to lose games, but there 100 percent are some positive takeaways from this game that we can build on for the coming games.”

summary: Revolution lost 2-1 to the Red Bulls on March 1, 2026.

Local fans remain hopeful for improvements in upcoming matches.

articles.title: Triston Casas reportedly unlikely to be ready by Opening Day, while Kutter Crawford, Patrick Sandoval take step forward in rehab
articles.description:
Crawford and Sandoval are more optimistic they'll be ready for Opening Day, but aren't placing that expectation on themselves.

The post Triston Casas reportedly unlikely to be ready by Opening Day, while Kutter Crawford, Patrick Sandoval take step forward in rehab appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Triston Casas is unlikely to return by Opening Day on March 30, 2023.

Casas' absence may impact the Red Sox's lineup and local fan expectations for the season.

articles.title: War powers debate intensifies after Trump orders attack on Iran without approval by Congress
articles.description:
But most Republicans, particularly their leaders, welcomed Trump's move against Iran.

summary: Trump ordered an attack on Iran without Congressional approval, escalating war powers debate.

articles.title: Chicopee installs security cameras on school bus stop arms to enforce illegal passing laws
articles.description:
The safety initiative was started in response to pilot programs showing alarming rates of drivers illegally passing.

summary: Chicopee installs security cameras on school bus stop arms to deter illegal passing.

Local residents can expect increased safety for children at bus stops due to enforcement.
